title: URAファイナルズ決勝にむけて

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! I've been waiting for you, Trainer
<username>!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
That face of yours tells me you are ready for a
challenge... Good! That is exactly what I want to
see.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Take heed! I have but one piece of advice for
you.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Believe in your trainee's strength and seize
victory together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The URA Finale... At long last, the gates will open
to the finals!
